category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a source code beautifier for C, C++, C#, and Java; official homepage describes Artistic Style as an automatic formatter for those languages and more.
display_name_sources: Official homepage uses Artistic Style as the project name; source_facts.name is astyle.
docs_sources: Official Artistic Style manual documents usage, options, formatting styles, and command-line behavior.
repo_sources: Official Artistic Style homepage lists 'Source code: https://gitlab.com/saalen/astyle' and mentions Git/Subversion source repositories.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage identify supported languages and formatter/beautifier purpose; source_facts.executables lists astyle CLI.
